description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat tactical vehicle resembling a World War I-era Renault FT light tank. The vehicle features a fully enclosed armored hull with a small, cylindrical turret mounted centrally on top, equipped with a visible machine gun. Its tracks are wide and robust, running along both sides of the hull, and the front is fitted with a distinctive angled metal plate, likely for obstacle clearing or added protection. The rear of the vehicle is boxy, with a protruding tail section and visible exhaust components. The surface is matte and painted in a dark, solid color, with riveted armor panels and minimal external markings. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and mobility in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A compact, tracked armored combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret and wide tracks, painted in a dark solid color. Features include a front angled plate, riveted armor, and a visible machine gun.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, armored hull, wide tracks, and the angled front plate with the turret centered above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, the cylindrical turret with a machine gun, and the angled front plate.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the boxy tail section, rear armor, and the ends of the tracks, with no visible weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, and front plate, with exhaust details visible near the rear.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible machine gun mount on the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with riveted steel armor plating, moderate thickness, sloped at the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid dark gray paint scheme.
